Off Calendar Aug-19-2011 Continued To Oct-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

AMENDED DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-23-2011 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NORTH BEACH CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Colin H. Jewel of Cholakian & Associates (650.871.9544) for defendant and moving party; Joe Klobas (707.933.1333) for plaintiff and responding party.
Argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: Defendant's demurrer to plaintiff's complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff's complaint is barred under the doctrine of Collateral Estoppel. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153
